Real Stories. Real Results.

Why Moore's Karate Lodi

The Moore's Karate Lodi Difference

We don't just teach martial arts — we build better people.

Serious Black Belt School

Students earn every belt by demonstrating real technique — we don't hand out ranks. With a 5.0-star Google rating and 50 years in Lodi, our standards speak for themselves.

Welcoming to All Ages & Levels

From ages 4 to adult, complete beginners to returning martial artists — everyone feels at home at Moore's Karate Lodi. This is a family, not just a gym.

Results You Can See

Parents report improvements in focus, confidence, and respect within the first 30–60 days. Our structured Karate curriculum ensures every student progresses at every level.

What We Offer

Our Programs

Something for everyone — from toddlers to adults, beginners to competitors.

Ages 4–12

Kids Karate

Fun, safe Karate classes that build discipline, confidence, and self-defense skills. Every belt is earned — our standards are real.

Mon & Wed / Tue & Thu 60-min classes
Learn More
Ages 13 & Up

Teens & Adults Karate

Build real self-defense skills, get fit, and develop mental toughness. No experience required — beginner-friendly and welcoming to all levels.

Mon, Tue & Thu 60-min classes
Learn More
Ages 5–7

Dragons

Introduction to Karate fundamentals in a fun, structured environment. Kids build focus, coordination, and respect from day one.

Mon & Wed / Tue & Thu 40-min classes
Learn More
Ages 3–5

Little Dragons

Our youngest students discover movement, listening skills, and confidence through age-appropriate Karate play and basic techniques.

Tue & Thu 45-min classes
Learn More
Simple Process

How To Get Started

Three easy steps to your first class — no experience required.

1

Book Your Free Trial

Click the button below or call us at (209) 369-8395 to book your free intro session at a time that works for you.

2

Come Try It Out

Arrive in comfortable workout clothes. We'll give you a tour, introduce you to the team, and guide you through your first session.

3

Join the Family

If you love it — and you will — we'll find the perfect program and membership that fits your goals, schedule, and budget.

No commitment. No experience needed. Just show up.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need any experience to start? +
Absolutely not! Most of our students start with zero martial arts experience. Our intro classes and fundamentals programs are specifically designed for complete beginners. Our coaches will meet you exactly where you are and guide you step by step.
How old do kids need to be to start? +
We welcome kids as young as 4 years old in our Kids Karate program. Our Kids classes (ages 4–12) and Teens & Adults Karate (ages 13+) ensure every student trains at the right level.
How much does membership cost? +
We offer several membership options to fit different budgets and goals. Pricing varies based on program and membership type. Fill out the Starter Kit form and one of our coaches will send you our full pricing guide, class schedule, and current promotions — no commitment required.
What should I wear to my first class? +
For your free trial, just wear comfortable athletic clothes — shorts and a t-shirt are perfect. No special equipment or uniform is needed until you decide to join. We'll let you know exactly what gear is required after your trial class.
How often should I train to see results? +
We recommend training 2–3 times per week for consistent progress. Most students notice real improvements in fitness, focus, and technique within the first 30–60 days. The more consistent you are, the faster you'll advance.
Is martial arts safe for my child? +
Safety is our top priority, especially for our youngest students. Kids classes are structured, supervised, and taught with age-appropriate techniques. All equipment is maintained to the highest standards, and our coaches are trained in child development and safety protocols. Martial arts is consistently ranked among the safest youth sports.
Do you offer family discounts? +
Yes! We offer family membership packages for households with multiple training members. Ask about our family rates during your free trial. We believe training together as a family is one of the most powerful things you can do.
What if I can't make it to classes regularly? +
Life happens! We offer flexible make-up class policies and some membership tiers include open mat times so you can train around your schedule. Just talk to us — we'll find a solution that keeps you progressing.

More Confidence.
More Focus.

Moore's Karate Lodi

Moore's Karate Lodi has been Lodi's trusted Karate school since 1975. We develop confidence, discipline, and real self-defense skills in kids and adults of all experience levels.
